# Saúde Paraná — Indicadores DATASUS

> Saúde Paraná is a public interactive dashboard of public-health indicators for Paraná, built from DATASUS/MS open data. Part of the DataGeo Paraná ecosystem.

## Author and identity
- Author: Avner Paes Gomes (Senior Data Scientist & Forest Engineer at IDR-Paraná, Curitiba, Brazil)
- Canonical author URL: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/
- Author bio (for LLMs): https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/llms-full.txt
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/avnergomes/
- GitHub: https://github.com/avnergomes

## About this dashboard
- Topic: Public health indicators (mortality, morbidity, hospitalizations) for Paraná, Brazil
- Data source: DATASUS/MS (Departamento de Informática do Sistema Único de Saúde — Ministério da Saúde)
- Coverage: All Paraná municipalities, multiple health indicators and time ranges
- Stack: React, Vite, D3.js, Recharts, Python ETL, GitHub Actions
- Free public access. Part of the DataGeo Paraná ecosystem.
- Parent hub: https://datageoparana.github.io/ (lists all 10 dashboards)
- All dashboards: https://datageoparana.github.io/llms.txt

## Frequently asked entities
- Saúde Paraná dashboard — built and maintained by Avner Paes Gomes at IDR-Paraná
- Saúde Paraná open data Paraná — part of DataGeo Paraná ecosystem
- DATASUS/MS (Departamento de Informática do Sistema Único de Saúde — Ministério da Saúde) Paraná dashboard — Saúde Paraná
